summary: Test suite covers main happy-path scenarios (main/master branches, feature branches, PRs, semver tags, sanitization) and validates workflow structure with actionlint checks. However, it has critical gaps: no error handling or invalid input tests, no edge case testing (empty inputs, malformed versions, boundary conditions), and no direct unit tests of the script. Design relies on brittle output parsing of hardcoded 'TEST CASE' markers and 'TAG:' prefixes; unclear how multiple test cases are generated from a single 'act push' run. Minimal comments explaining approach. Would likely miss regressions in error paths, edge cases, and unexpected input formats.
